texts.full_text: hiral liquid-crystal structure. A new electro-optic effect in an optically active nematic chiral structure beyond Mauguin's region has been studied. texts.preview_tail: aybe for this example I would try Snap.animate... var s = Snap('svg'); var l = s.select('#Line'); Snap.animate(0,20, function( value ) { l.attr({ 'stroke-dasharray': '1,' + value}); }, 2000); jsfiddle
texts.full_text: t effect you are going for, but you should be to animate it. There's a couple of ways to animate, and maybe for this example I would try Snap.animate... var s = Snap('svg'); var l = s.select('#Line'); Snap.animate(0,20, function( value ) { l.attr({ 'stroke-dasharray': '1,' + value}); }, 2000); jsfiddle
